params.name: Holy Nail
params.description:
On Jan 3, 34 AD, this Holy Nail was kept by devout believers of St. Paul as a great treasure.
After Jesus' crucifixion, St. Paul took the nails out of his tomb. Legend has it that 3 nails were used for the crucifixion of Jesus, while others said 4 were used. Another legend said that 1 of the nails was melted to make a crown. Another nail was said to be thrown into the roaring waves to calm the sea and only 1 nail was left now. [Basic Info] Quantity: 5. Size: 5-7 inches. Use: Restrain zombies …
